description: Methodology model emphasizing rigorous hadith authentication and direct primary-text grounding. Boosts sahih and hasan gradings, strong isnads, and corroboration across independent chains. Reduces weight on weakly attested narrations and material whose chain quality is unknown.
methodology_overview: Reasons with a hadith-centric, isnad-rigorous lens. Primary texts and classical authorities lead. Modern fatwa material is consulted secondarily. Unknowns are flagged rather than smoothed over.
methodology_disclaimer: This profile is methodology modeling, not the scholar speaking. It applies a transparent weighting pattern commonly associated with rigorous hadith-focused scholarship. It is not revelation, not a fatwa, not divine certainty. Edit config/trust_profiles/shaykh_jamal_methodology.json to refine the weights to match a specific scholar's documented preferences.
